title: Cancrinia paropamisica
taxonomy: Cancrinia paropamisica is classified within the family Brassicaceae, which includes various species of mustard and cress plants. This classification places it within the order Brassicales. Further, it belongs to the genus Cancrinia, a group of plants primarily found in mountainous regions. Cancrinia paropamisica is a species of flowering plant native to Afghanistan. It is also known as a member of the tribe Brassiceae, a subgroup within the Brassicaceae family.
